data.name: Beyond the Edge
data.detailed_description:
Three hundred years after the event which they now call Impact. Humanity has overcome the plague and put together shattered pieces of civilization. It is now entering a new age. A golden age of culture and technology for some. A deceptive age of decadence for others.

You tell them that it's the result of traveling to the black zone, to the site of the first Impact. The infection changed your skin forever, you say. But there's no truth to it. You were never human.

An outcast, a freak, anyone who doesn't scream for the Inquisition to come is your ally. Together you build a safe place, you become a force too costly to fight. But even there, among your friends, you still hear voices. Someone sings in the dark. They were always there, long before humans existed. And they are looking for the blood of their own.

Your ambitions are costly. And the only way to fulfill them quickly is something few people take on. Lands are filled with mutated beasts, unfortunate victims of the Impact. Purging those lands fills your pockets, makes enviroment safer, and brings new allies to your castle.

Gather your party and develop skills of its members, both magical and physical. Improve your castle grounds by building new structures. Craft rings and pieces of gear, experiment and refine your purification skills.

  • 8-14 Hours of content.

  • Advanced combat system, which opens a lot of space for experimentation and creativity.

  • A sense of constant growth. Whatever you do, you feel progress. Evolve magically, physically, socially. The world senses your diligence and rewards it.

  • A lore-rich world that lives by its own rules and doesn't care if you haven't learned them yet.

  • Inhuman romance story. The story is not only about hunger, but also about the feelings that arise when it is sated.

  • Shifting focus. The game is enough on its own when you want to feel this world and characters, live among them and experience the story. But more than enough when you want to feel something more, providing long intimate sequences when you need them most.

  • Stunning visuals. Plentiful artwork won't make you wonder what happened behind closed doors. You'll see for yourself.

  • Lots of animated scenes. For when imagination is not enough.

data.short_description: Beyond the Edge is a dark fantasy RPG that puts you in a role of an inhuman beast hunter. It is a story from another world, where the night comes twice a day. A story about hunger, loss and love.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2500K
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
